insight.description: Atomic belief statements — single propositions extracted from experience

problem.description: Problems encountered — root causes, context, impact

tool.description: Tools and technologies used or evaluated

event.description: Significant events — incidents, milestones, decisions in context

relation_types.extends: extends or builds upon the target
relation_types.caused-by: this event/problem was caused by the target
relation_types.learned-from: this insight was learned from the target event/problem
relation_types.part-of: this entity is a component of the target
relation_types.used-in: this tool/concept is used in the target project/concept
